heroImage: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(139, 69, 19, 0.86), rgba(184, 134, 11, 0.4)), radial-gradient(circle at 30% 18%, rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.26), transparent 34%), radial-gradient(circle at 78% 28%, rgba(210, 180, 140, 0.24), transparent 30%)

zh.title: 永宁门·古都声韵
zh.subtitle: 早晨门洞里脚步空阔，车铃与鸟鸣混成清脆的醒。入夜后车灯成河，笛声擦过城墙的纹理。滚动间，昔日金戈化作今日流光。

scenes.subtitle: 晨曦 / Gate awakens
scenes.title: 城门在晨曦中苏醒
scenes.description: 高大的城门洞口中，晨风夹着鸟鸣吹过，城门外的商旅开始聚集，脚步声和讨价还价的声音逐渐交织成一幅古都清晨的声景画卷。

hotspots.label: 门洞回声
hotspots.title: 门洞回声
hotspots.text: 清晨时分，风穿过高大的城门洞，会被石头和木结构放大和延伸，形成一种具有地标特征的音响特征。

hotspots.label: 商业人语
hotspots.title: 商业人语
hotspots.text: 商人和旅客在城门前汇聚，讨论生意和路线，形成一种特有的市场语言，充满了交易的活力。

scenes.subtitle: 午时 / Commerce flowing
scenes.title: 门前商业的繁荣脉动
scenes.description: 中午时分，城门前人来人往，商贩的叫卖声、驼队的铃铛声、马蹄声、讨价还价声混在一起，形成古代丝路贸易的真实写照。

hotspots.label: 驼队铃铛
hotspots.title: 驼队铃铛
hotspots.text: 远来的驼队摇着铃铛进入城门，这是丝绸之路贸易繁荣的最直接证据，每一声铃铛都诉说着一个商业故事。

scenes.subtitle: 暮色 / Guard ritual
scenes.title: 暮色中城门的例行准备
scenes.description: 黄昏时分，城门开始准备关闭，守卫的吹号声、城门关闭的声响、最后的商人匆匆离去的脚步声，构成了古城一天的结束。

hotspots.label: 城门关闭
hotspots.title: 城门关闭
hotspots.text: 随着暮色加深，城门的关闭仪式开始，沉重的木门发出深沉的吱呀声，这是古城日常循环中最富仪式感的时刻。

en.title: Yongning Gate: Gateway Through Time
en.subtitle: From morning birdsong and merchant footsteps at the ancient gate, to evening drum and bell sounds, experience an acoustic journey through centuries of commerce and culture.

scenes.subtitle: Dawn / Gate awakens
scenes.title: City gate awakens at dawn
scenes.description: Morning wind with birdsong flows through the tall gate passage, while merchants and travelers begin to gather, their footsteps and voices weaving together into an ancient dawn soundscape.

hotspots.label: Gate Passage
hotspots.title: Gate Passage
hotspots.text: At dawn, wind passes through the towering gate tunnel and is amplified by stone and wood, creating a distinctive acoustic landmark of this ancient passage.

hotspots.label: Commerce Talk
hotspots.title: Commerce Talk
hotspots.text: Merchants and travelers converge at the gate, negotiating routes and deals, their conversations creating a unique marketplace language filled with trading vitality.

scenes.subtitle: Noon / Commerce flowing
scenes.title: Prosperity pulses at the gate
scenes.description: At midday, the gate throngs with endless traffic—vendor calls, camel bells, hoofbeats, and haggling voices blend together, echoing the prosperity of ancient Silk Road trade.

hotspots.label: Caravan Bells
hotspots.title: Caravan Bells
hotspots.text: Incoming caravans ring their bells as they pass through the gate—each chime an echo of trade routes, commerce, and cultural exchange spanning continents.

scenes.subtitle: Dusk / Guard ritual
scenes.title: Evening preparations at the gate
scenes.description: As twilight falls, the gate prepares to close—guard trumpet calls, creaking hinges, the last merchants hurrying through—a sacred closing ritual marking the ancient city's day.

hotspots.label: Gate Closing
hotspots.title: Gate Closing
hotspots.text: As darkness deepens, the gate-closing ceremony begins, heavy wooden doors creak with solemn resonance—the most ceremonial moment in the city's daily cycle.
